'''Mount Scich'tl''' was a [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] on [[Barab I/Legends|Barab I]], adjacent to [[Alater-ka]], the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]].<ref name="TEGtPaM" />
